title: Hybrid Project Plans and Changes
description:
Hybrid Project Plans and Changes is a beginner-level course for project managers, team leads, and professionals who need to control project timelines in the face of constant change. In today's dynamic workplace, even small, undocumented scope changes can lead to major delays, budget overruns, and frustrated teams. This course provides the essential framework for managing change effectively by blending the stability of Waterfall with the flexibility of Agile methodologies.

You will work through hands-on assignments, real-world case studies, and interactive coaching dialogues to master the tools of modern project leadership. Further, you will learn to perform critical-path analysis to identify timeline risks, build a change log to create a single source of truth, and develop a communication plan to keep stakeholders aligned. Whether you are managing a software rollout or a new product launch, you will practice the skills to stop scope creep and make data-driven decisions. This course will equip you to lead with confidence, turning reactive firefighting into proactive, strategic change management.
